summary: Event handler that modifies skill properties when skills with specific tags are used. The effect triggers OnBeforeAnySkillUsed, checks if the skill being used contains all required tags, and if so, applies a property modification (either additive or multiplicative based on the PropertyType).

functions_analyzed.name: ChangeSkillsWithTags.ctor
functions_analyzed.purpose: Constructor that initializes the effect with an empty TagType array at offset 0x58 and sets ValueMult to 1.0 (0x3f800000) at offset 0x68

functions_analyzed.name: ChangeSkillsWithTags.Create
functions_analyzed.purpose: Factory method that creates a ChangeSkillsWithTagsHandler instance and stores the effect definition at handler offset 0x18

functions_analyzed.name: ChangeSkillsWithTagsHandler.OnBeforeAnySkillUsed
functions_analyzed.purpose: Main event handler that executes when any skill is about to be used. Checks tag matching and applies property modifications

fields_analyzed.name: TargetTags
fields_analyzed.description: Array of TagType enum values specifying which skill tags must ALL be present on the skill for this effect to apply. Uses ContainsAllTags for matching against skill.Template.Tags (offset 0xa8 on skill template).

fields_analyzed.name: PropertyType
fields_analyzed.description: Enum value determining which entity property to modify. Values 9-28, 35-36, 41, 43-44, 46-47, 49, 52, 55, 57, 60, 64, 67, 71 are multiplicative properties; all others are additive. The property type determines whether UpdateProperty or UpdateMultProperty is called.

fields_analyzed.name: Value
fields_analyzed.description: Integer value used for ADDITIVE property modifications. Only used when PropertyType indicates a non-multiplicative property. Added directly to the target entity's property value via UpdateProperty.

fields_analyzed.name: ValueMult
fields_analyzed.description: Float multiplier used for MULTIPLICATIVE property modifications. Only used when PropertyType indicates a multiplicative property. Applied via UpdateMultProperty using AddMult formula: (mult-1.0)+currentValue, allowing multipliers to stack additively as percentages.

fields_analyzed.name: HideInTooltip (inferred)
fields_analyzed.description: Likely boolean flag controlling whether this effect is displayed in skill tooltips. Inferred from similar effect classes (ChangePropertyConditional has this field). Not accessed in OnBeforeAnySkillUsed but may be used by tooltip generation code.

handler_fields.name: Skill
handler_fields.description: Reference to the skill that owns this handler, used to get the actor via GetActor()

handler_fields.name: Effect
handler_fields.description: Reference to the effect definition containing the configuration fields

key_discoveries.details: Uses ContainsAllTags (0x180525200) to check if skill.Template.Tags (offset 0xa8) contains ALL tags from TargetTags. This is an AND operation - all specified tags must be present for the effect to apply.

The effect supports both additive (Value at 0x64) and multiplicative (ValueMult at 0x68) modifications. The PropertyType enum determines which is used via IsMultProperty check. Both fields exist but only one is used per effect instance.

Multiplicative properties use AddMult formula which converts multipliers to percentage bonuses that stack additively: newValue = (mult - 1.0) + currentValue. A 1.5x multiplier adds 0.5 (50%) rather than true multiplication.
Modifications are applied to the 5th parameter (param_5/EntityProperties) passed to OnBeforeAnySkillUsed, which represents the skill's calculated properties during use.
The handler checks if skill parameter (param_2) has a valid template (offset 0x10) using UnityEngine.Object equality check before proceeding with tag matching.

related_functions.name: IsMultProperty
related_functions.purpose: Determines if PropertyType enum is multiplicative or additive

related_functions.name: UpdateProperty
related_functions.purpose: Applies additive value to entity property

related_functions.name: UpdateMultProperty
related_functions.purpose: Applies multiplicative value using AddMult formula

related_functions.name: ContainsAllTags
related_functions.purpose: Checks if first tag list contains all tags from second list

ghidra_comments_added.comment: Field documentation for ChangeSkillsWithTags effect structure
Handler behavior and field usage documentation
